_meta.purpose: Founder-AUTHORED eligibility judgment: an entity qualifies for an outcome. No source can DERIVE this (it is genuine business judgment), so it is authored here, founder-signed, and compiled into a generated check. This is the SCAFFOLD example — review/adjust, then it is enforced.
_meta.signed_off: SCAFFOLD EXAMPLE — pending founder review (replace with your sign-off to enforce)
_meta.how: Each rule: when.all = conditions that must ALL hold for eligibility; gen_rules compiles isEligible<Entity>_<action>(row) -> {eligible, reason}. Ops: equals | not_equals | is_true | not_empty | in.

then.else_reason: Not eligible for a certificate: the result must be published and certificate eligibility must be 'eligible'.
